case_title: STORY ROAD CONSULTING LLC. VS MISSION ECONOMIC & CULTURAL ASSOC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY STORY ROAD CONSULTING LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC & CULTURAL ASSOC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC & CULTURAL ASSOC.
PLTF'S FILING OF "REQUEST FOR ACCOMODATIONS BY PER SONS WITH DISABILITIES AND ORDER" FOR COMM'S SIG.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC & CULTURAL ASSOC.
CASE WAS HEARD BY COMM. LARRY BECKER IN ROOM 212.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STORY ROAD CONSULTING LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC & CULTURAL ASSOC. $1,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,720.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC & CULTURAL ASSOC.
